programme.title: The Killer Among Us
programme.desc: Trust no one in this chilling preview of Oxygen's The Killer Among Us, hosted by Alan Cumming.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: The fire breaks out before dawn; after the smoke clears, a mother of two young children is found dead; it's the tragic end to a life that held so much promise, but for investigators, it is just the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: A man makes a frantic call to 911 after finding his wife dead in a bathtub, but the couple's daughters lead police to investigate their father.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered
programme.desc: Detectives believed two young children witnessed the brutal murder of their mother; the prosecution builds their case around what they thought those kids observed, but another version of events may be possible.

programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: A well-respected firefighter and loving family man is found gunned down outside his Philadelphia home, sending police on a furious search for his killers; what they find stuns even the most hardened investigators among them.

programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: The disappearance of a loving family in rural Arkansas leaves authorities searching for clues; a discovery puts them on the trail of ruthless killers driven by hate and revenge.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Secrets emerge and a family is torn apart when a cop's wife is shot to death in her bed.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Secrets emerge and a family is torn apart when a cop's wife is shot to death in her bed.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Key players in the case of Rod Covlin, a New York man who is found guilty of murdering his wife for her $5.3 million fortune and attempting to frame his then-teenage daughter, share their stories.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: After a man is found murdered, detectives search for a motive in the seemingly senseless slaying; after considering whether it was a case of mistaken identity or a robbery, investigators ask if secret desires caused a killer to strike in God's name.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: A newlywed bride disappears during a freezing Canadian winter leaving police with few clues; the search for her uncovers an unconventional marriage leading to multiple suspects.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: Two young newlyweds move in with the groom's mom to build for their future, but when they mysteriously disappear, investigators embark on a cross-country manhunt for a cold-blooded con man and killer.

programme.title: A Wedding and a Murder
programme.desc: Eight days before the wedding of their dreams, a couple's plans are derailed by a brutal murder; a detailed investigation unravels a murder-for-hire plot that leads them to suspect a member of the wedding party.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Dennis Murphy reported on the twists and turns of the Jennifer Dulos case.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A college student is found murdered and the case sits cold for nearly 40 years; Josh Mankiewicz reflects on the vow that keeps the case alive and the innovative method used to catch the killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: An aspiring Playboy model is murdered in Miami; a seven-second clip of her last moments alive are caught on security video and could hold key clues; the haunting images make this case one of Dennis Murphy's most memorable.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A man claims his wife died by suicide, but a suspicious house fire 24 years later raises doubts; Josh Mankiewicz remembers the suspect who could not stop talking.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: When a pastor loses a second wife in an accident, authorities become suspicious; Dennis Murphy returns to this unforgettable story of evil and betrayal, wondering how far this man of God might have fallen.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Years after a Montana man is found dead, his son searches for answers; Keith Morrison cannot forget the son who opened a box and faced a terrifying family secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: When an Iowa woman is attacked while home alone with her three children, the confrontation turns deadly; Dennis Murphy examines one of the most sophisticated criminal plots of his "Dateline" career.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: When Josh Mankiewicz gets asked about his most memorable stories, the name Dayna Herroz comes to mind; after her daughter and 10-month-old grandson are murdered, her quest for justice ends with a twist in a San Diego courtroom.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A pregnant woman vanishes before her own baby shower and her worried family raises the alarm as detectives unravel a chilling mystery; for Josh Mankiewicz, it was a heartbreaking case that stayed with him long after the cameras stopped rolling.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: After a nurse and mother-of-three is murdered inside her Illinois home, investigators uncover security camera footage that could be key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programme.desc: A bombshell more than a decade after the crime reignites the investigation into the death of Sarah Pagel's mother; Andrea Canning looks back at her emotional interview with Sarah, whose mom touched so many lives.

programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: When a loving couple is discovered murdered execution-style in front of their Kansas home, police race to uncover the truth about who wanted them dead.

programme.title: A Plan to Kill
programme.desc: A shooting in the central Florida community of Deltona leaves a young man dead; while his fiancée mourns the death of her partner, police dig into their past to try and find out who would want to end their life together before it began.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Real estate developer Gary Triano lived large and when he was murdered there were whispers of a mob connection, an angry investor, or a mad ex, but the mystery took nearly two decades to unravel.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Real estate developer Gary Triano lived large and when he was murdered there were whispers of a mob connection, an angry investor, or a mad ex, but the mystery took nearly two decades to unravel.

programme.title: Dateline
programme.desc: Two Tulsa brothers fight for more than 20 years to prove their innocence after they were wrongfully convicted for separate murders.

programme.title: Murder for Hire
programme.desc: A teenage mother starts to make questionable choices when the father of her two children comes back into their lives; when the court grants custody to the father, she decides she must do whatever necessary to get them back.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murdered by Morning
programme.desc: Rowdy night at Chicago pub turns deadly when daybreak reveals mutilated body; police cross state lines to track a killer, but it will take an unexpected call and a brutal betrayal to finally solve this case and find justice.

programme.title: Murder for Hire
programme.desc: Family drama turns deadly when an ostracized mother-in-law calls on an old friend, who once had a connection to the mob, to murder her own daughter-in-law.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Family Massacre
programme.desc: When a house fire reveals the violent murder of an entire family, the town of Fishkill is shaken; state investigators dig into the victims' past and uncover disturbing connections while using the latest technology to find the killers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Family Massacre
programme.desc: Sheriff's deputies find the bodies of a woman and her two sons beaten and covered inside her home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fatal Family Feuds
programme.desc: A mother is found savagely murdered in her upscale home, leaving a father and son to blame each other; their airtight alibis lead detectives to a murder plot involving an estranged sibling with nothing to lose.

programme.title: Fatal Family Feuds
programme.desc: Firefighters discover a body in the wreckage of a rural inferno and uncover a deep-seated dispute between a pair of stepsons and their surrogate father that may be to blame; police uncover stunning footage that reveals the truth behind the attack.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: A woman's sudden death in a Detroit hotel unravels a dark web of secrets, lies and deadly coincidences that hint at something far more sinister.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: A 10-year-old calls 911 after shooting his dad; it seems like a tragic accident until, nine years later, he reveals a darker truth.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: Found with a gunshot wound to her chest, a woman's family seeks justice for 20 years after the would-be murder suspect proclaims suicide.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard
programme.desc: The discovery of a body buried in a Delaware backyard launches police into an investigation that leads them on a twisted path through bizarre family ties, an unexpected love triangle and an unthinkable murder plot.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard
programme.desc: Investigators believe a young woman left of her own accord, but her mother is convinced that someone close to her is hiding a big secret; a two-year search for the truth brings investigators to the backyard of a historic location.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The brutal murder of Sabrina's foster mother raised questions about her relationship with her foster father.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: Lynette flees the country when her ex-boyfriend is shot during a custody dispute; investigators face many challenges.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A brutal death reveals a disturbing family secret and pits mother against daughter.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The community must decide who to side with after a mother's fury leads to a shooting in the woods.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: The discovery of a dismembered man rocks a close-knit town as shocking accusations spread about the alleged culprit and his doting mother.

programme.title: Snapped
programme.desc: A young mother claims she was caught up in her boyfriend's murderous plan.
